name: Fiorella - Wishlist Back in Stock WhatsApp Notification
description: Monitors product stock changes and notifies customers via WhatsApp when a wishlisted product is back in stock. Connect this to your Fiorella admin panel or database webhook.

nodes.name: Webhook - Stock Update
nodes.notes: Receives POST from your Fiorella admin when a product is toggled back in stock. Expected payload: { productId, productName, productSlug, productPrice, productImage }

nodes.name: Filter - Only Back in Stock
nodes.notes: Only proceed if the product was toggled TO in-stock (not out of stock)

nodes.name: Query Wishlist DB

parameters.query: SELECT DISTINCT w.customer_phone, w.customer_name, p.nombre as product_name, p.slug, p.precio FROM wishlist_subscriptions w JOIN "Product" p ON w.product_id = p.id WHERE w.product_id = '{{ $json.productId }}' AND w.notified = false

nodes.notes: Queries all customers who wishlisted this product and haven't been notified yet. You'll need a 'wishlist_subscriptions' table in your Supabase DB.

nodes.name: Split Customers
nodes.notes: Process one customer at a time to avoid WhatsApp rate limits

nodes.name: Send WhatsApp Message

parameters.name: text
parameters.value:
={{ '¡Hola ' + $json.customer_name + '! 🌸

El producto que guardaste en favoritos ya está disponible:

*' + $json.product_name + '*
Precio: $' + $json.precio + ' MXN

🛒 Cómpralo antes de que se agote:
https://fiorellaballoons.mx/producto/' + $json.slug + '

— Fiorella Balloons 💐' }}

nodes.notes: Sends a personalized WhatsApp notification. Replace with your WhatsApp Business API endpoint (Twilio, Meta Cloud API, or 360dialog).

nodes.name: Mark as Notified

parameters.query: UPDATE wishlist_subscriptions SET notified = true, notified_at = NOW() WHERE product_id = '{{ $json.productId }}' AND customer_phone = '{{ $json.customer_phone }}'

nodes.notes: Marks the subscription as notified so we don't send duplicate messages

setup_instructions.step_1: Create a 'wishlist_subscriptions' table in your Supabase/PostgreSQL database with columns: id, product_id, customer_phone, customer_name, notified (boolean), notified_at (timestamp), created_at
setup_instructions.step_2: Add an API endpoint in your Fiorella app that creates wishlist subscriptions when customers provide their phone number
setup_instructions.step_3: Add a webhook call in your admin product edit page that fires when enStock is toggled to true
setup_instructions.step_4: Configure your WhatsApp Business API credentials (Twilio or Meta Cloud API)
setup_instructions.step_5: Import this workflow into n8n and configure the PostgreSQL and WhatsApp credentials
setup_instructions.step_6: Activate the workflow and test with a sample product toggle
